title: Implement: Queue latency metrics (all implementations)
description: Policy: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md §Measuring Queue Latency. Add: packets_queued, packets_dropped_deadline, packets_dropped_full, max_latency_ms, avg_latency_ms. Expose via /status/queues CoAP.
close_reason: Decomposed into sub-beads: .1 (Rust TxQueueStats), .2 (C CoAP endpoint), .3 (Python metrics). Current state: Rust has TxQueueStats but missing latency tracking and drop reason split; C has /status but no /status/queues; Python has no queue metrics.
